info.name: tadeumendonca-api
info.description: Smoke + contract regression for the BFF. Black-box checks against a real deployed environment (or a local server). Parametrized by environment (local/staging/production) via {{base_url}}; authenticated writes use {{token}} (a test user's Cognito access token, injected as an env var). Run with newman — see package.json `api-test`.

exec: pm.test('every item carries a kind discriminator', () => b.items.forEach(i => pm.expect(['post','article']).to.include(i.kind)));
pm.test('admin write is rejected without a token — the API Gateway Cognito authorizer returns 401', () => pm.response.to.have.status(401));

item.name: Auth (admin): POST /posts creates a draft (only when {{token}} is set)

body.raw: {"title":"regression draft","body":"created by the api regression smoke; deleted next","published":false}

exec: if (!pm.environment.get('token')) { console.log('no {{token}} — skipping admin write'); return; }
pm.test('admin can create a post (201)', () => pm.response.to.have.status(201));
pm.test('the created post is a draft (kept out of the public feed)', () => pm.expect(pm.response.json().published).to.eql(false));

item.name: Auth (admin): DELETE the draft (cleanup; only when {{token}} is set)

exec: if (!pm.environment.get('token') || !pm.collectionVariables.get('created_post_id')) { console.log('no token / nothing created — skipping cleanup'); return; }
pm.test('admin can delete the post (204)', () => pm.response.to.have.status(204));
